errors.app_message: The page hit an unexpected error. Your session and data are safe.
errors.page_message: An unexpected error happened. Your data is safe; please try again.

common.name: Name
common.defaultDeleteDesc: This action cannot be undone. The transaction will be permanently deleted.

login.subtitle: Sign in to your account
login.error_expired: Your session has expired. Please sign in again.
login.error_invalid: Incorrect email or password. If your account doesn't exist, register again.
login.error_bad_credentials: Invalid credentials. Check your email and password.
login.error_wrong_credentials: Incorrect credentials. Check your email and password.
login.error_server: The server did not respond correctly. Please try again in a few seconds.
login.error_network: Could not connect to the server. Check your connection.

register.subtitle: Create your account
register.error_name_short: Full name must be at least 2 characters.
register.error_password_short: Password must be at least 8 characters.
register.error_email_taken: An account with that email already exists. Sign in or use another email.
register.error_invalid_data: Some data is invalid. Check the form and try again.
register.error_server: The server did not respond. Please try again in a few seconds.
register.error_network: Could not connect to the server. Check your connection.
register.error_generic: Could not create the account. Please try again.

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.subtitle: Overview of your finances
dashboard.delta_income_up: You generated more income, good pace.
dashboard.delta_income_down: Your income decreased compared to the previous period.
dashboard.delta_expense_down: You spent less than before, well done.
dashboard.delta_expense_up: Your expenses increased compared to the previous period.
dashboard.delta_savings_up: You are saving a greater proportion of your income.
dashboard.delta_savings_down: Your savings rate decreased compared to the previous period.
dashboard.chart_empty_expenses: No expenses recorded for the period.
dashboard.empty_subtitle: Adjust the date filter or import transactions.
dashboard.help_net_worth: Sum of current balances of all your accounts in the selected currency.
dashboard.help_income: Total money inflows recorded in the period.
dashboard.help_savings_rate: Percentage of your income that you didn't spend. ≥20% is healthy.
dashboard.help_balance: Income minus expenses for the selected period.
dashboard.help_movements: Total number of transactions recorded in the period.
dashboard.help_expense_ratio: What fraction of your income goes to expenses.
dashboard.help_top_category: The category that concentrated the highest expense amount in the period.
dashboard.help_top_expense: The expense transaction with the highest recorded amount.
dashboard.help_cash_coverage: How many months you could sustain yourself with your current net worth.
dashboard.help_worst_month: The month with the highest level of expenses.
dashboard.help_expense_change: Percentage change in total expenses versus the previous period.
dashboard.help_fixed_ratio: Proportion of total expenses that corresponds to recurring obligations.
dashboard.help_chart_income_vs_expense: Monthly income and expense bars side by side.
dashboard.help_chart_net_flow: Monthly difference between income and expenses.
dashboard.help_chart_top_categories: The 10 most important expense categories for the period.
dashboard.help_chart_expense_dist: Proportional view (donut) of how much each category represents.
dashboard.help_chart_savings: Sum of net flow month by month throughout the period.
dashboard.help_chart_fixed_var: Compares total spending on fixed obligations against variable expenses.
dashboard.help_chart_by_category_month: Stacked bars showing how spending evolves by category.
dashboard.inv_kpi_invested_help: Sum of the original money invested across all active positions
dashboard.inv_kpi_current_help: Current market value of all portfolio positions
dashboard.inv_kpi_result_help: Net difference between current value and invested capital. Positive = gain, negative = loss.
dashboard.inv_kpi_return_help: Total percentage gain or loss relative to invested capital (global ROI)
dashboard.inv_kpi_weighted_return_help: Average portfolio return, weighted by each position's share of total invested capital
dashboard.inv_kpi_at_risk_help: Original capital committed in positions currently trading below entry price
dashboard.inv_kpi_entities_help: Number of distinct brokers, banks, exchanges or managers where you hold assets
dashboard.inv_kpi_avg_holding_help: Average number of days from each position's start date to today
dashboard.inv_insight_top_performer_help: Position with the highest percentage return on invested capital
dashboard.inv_insight_worst_performer_help: Position with the lowest percentage return on invested capital
dashboard.inv_insight_largest_position_help: Investment with the highest weight in the portfolio by current value
dashboard.inv_insight_top_entity_help: Entity with the most capital invested in the portfolio
dashboard.inv_insight_positive_positions_help: Percentage of positions currently above the invested capital
dashboard.inv_insight_instrument_types_help: Number of distinct instrument types in the portfolio
dashboard.inv_insight_oldest_help: The investment with the most time in the portfolio
dashboard.inv_insight_diversification_help: Qualitative assessment based on number of distinct instruments and entities
dashboard.inv_dist_help: Portfolio breakdown by invested instrument types (Stocks, Bonds, Funds, etc.)
dashboard.inv_pos_help: Detailed list of all active investments with performance information

accounts.title: Accounts
accounts.subtitle: Create and manage your bank accounts.
accounts.create_desc: Register a new account to start moving money.
accounts.delete_desc: Are you sure you want to delete the account "{{name}}"? This action cannot be undone.
accounts.no_banks_warning: No banks available. Create banks from Administration.
accounts.table_empty_desc: Adjust the filters or create a new account.
accounts.metric_total_help: Total accounts matching the current filters.
accounts.metric_savings_help: Number of savings accounts within the active filter.
accounts.metric_checking_help: Number of checking accounts within the active filter.
accounts.metric_banks_help: Number of banks represented in the filtered accounts.
accounts.toast_name_short: Account name must be at least 2 characters.
accounts.toast_select_bank: Select a bank to create the account.

transactions.title: Transactions
transactions.subtitle: Register, filter and manage your income and expenses from a single view.
transactions.form_register_desc: Fill in the details to register a new transaction.
transactions.form_edit_desc: You are updating an existing transaction.
transactions.table_empty_desc: Adjust the filters or register a new transaction.
transactions.metric_total_help: Total transactions matching the current filters.
transactions.metric_income_help: Sum of income transactions within the active filter.
transactions.metric_expense_help: Sum of expense transactions within the active filter.
transactions.metric_flow_help: Difference between income and expenses in the current filter.
transactions.transfer_desc: You can only transfer between accounts of the same currency.
transactions.pocket_desc: Transfer money from an account to one of its pockets.
transactions.toast_desc_short: Description must be at least 2 characters.
transactions.toast_select_type: Select the transaction type (Expense or Income).
transactions.toast_select_account: Select an account to register the transaction.
transactions.toast_category_required: Expenses must have an associated category.
transactions.toast_no_account: First create or select an account to register transactions.
transactions.toast_pocket_error: Could not move amount to pocket.
transactions.toast_withdraw_error: Could not withdraw amount from pocket.
transactions.toast_transfer_same_account: Source and destination accounts must be different.

investments.title: Investments
investments.subtitle: Track your investment positions.
investments.create_desc: Register a new investment in your portfolio.
investments.delete_desc: Delete investment "{{name}}"? This action cannot be undone.
investments.empty_no_investments: You have no investments registered yet. Create one with the + button.
investments.empty_no_results: No investments match the current filters.
investments.empty_create_hint: Register your first investment with the + button.
investments.empty_filter_hint: Try a different term or clear the filters.
investments.toast_name_short: Name must be at least 2 characters.
investments.toast_amount_zero: Invested amount must be greater than 0.
investments.toast_value_negative: Current value must be 0 or greater.

pockets.title: Pockets
pockets.subtitle: Associate pockets with your accounts to separate money by purpose.
pockets.delete_desc: Are you sure you want to delete the pocket "{{name}}"?
pockets.initial_balance_alert: The initial balance cannot be modified after creating the pocket. Use Move to pocket to update the balance.
pockets.currency_note: Pockets only hold money for specific purposes and use the same currency as the account: {{currency}}
pockets.filter_search_placeholder: Search by pocket, account, bank or currency
pockets.empty_no_accounts_title: You need to create an account before registering pockets.
pockets.empty_no_accounts_desc: Pockets always belong to a bank account.
pockets.empty_no_results: No pockets match the current filters.
pockets.empty_create_hint: Create the first one to separate money by specific goals.
pockets.empty_filter_hint: Try another term or clear the filters.
pockets.toast_name_short: Pocket name must be at least 2 characters.
pockets.toast_select_account: Select an account for the pocket.
pockets.toast_balance_invalid: Initial balance must be a number greater than or equal to 0.
pockets.toast_invalid_account: The selected account is not valid.
pockets.withdraw_desc: Return money from a pocket to its account's available balance.
pockets.toast_withdraw_error: Could not withdraw amount from pocket.

categories.delete_desc: Delete "{{name}}"? Associated transactions will have no category.
categories.field_description_placeholder: E.g.: monthly payments, bills, fixed invoices...
categories.empty_desc: Create your first category using the button below.

admin.title: Administration
admin.subtitle: Manage the base catalogs of the system, such as banks, investment entities, countries and categories.

banks.create_desc: Add a bank available for associating new accounts.
banks.edit_desc: Modify the bank name or country code.
banks.delete_desc: Delete "{{name}}"? Associated accounts will lose the bank reference.
banks.table_empty_desc: Adjust the filters or create a new bank.
banks.metric_total_help: Total banks matching the current filters.
banks.metric_countries_help: Number of country codes represented in the filtered results.
banks.toast_name_short: Bank name must be at least 2 characters.
banks.toast_no_country: You must create and select a country before creating banks.
banks.toast_no_country_hint: Create at least one country to register banks.

countries.create_desc: Add a new country to the administrative catalog.
countries.edit_desc: Update the name or code of the selected country.
countries.delete_desc: Delete "{{name}}"? This action cannot be undone.
countries.table_empty_desc: Adjust the filters or create a new country.
countries.metric_total_help: Total countries matching the current filters.

entities.create_desc: Add an entity to associate new investments.
entities.edit_desc: Modify the entity's name, type or country.
entities.delete_desc: Delete "{{name}}"? Associated investments will also be deleted.
entities.table_empty_desc: Adjust the filters or create a new entity.
entities.metric_total_help: Total investment entities matching the current filters.
entities.metric_countries_help: Number of country codes represented in the filtered results.
entities.metric_types_help: Number of entity types present in the filtered results.
entities.toast_name_short: Entity name must be at least 2 characters.
entities.toast_no_country: You must create and select a country before creating entities.
entities.toast_create_error: Could not create the investment entity.
entities.toast_update_error: Could not update the investment entity.
entities.toast_delete_error: Could not delete the investment entity.
entities.toast_no_country_hint: Create at least one country to register entities.

profile.title: My profile
profile.subtitle: Manage your personal information and password.
profile.toast_name_short: Name must be at least 2 characters.
profile.toast_current_password_required: Enter your current password to change it.
profile.toast_new_password_short: New password must be at least 8 characters.
profile.toast_email_taken: That email is already in use by another account.
profile.toast_current_password_missing: You must enter your current password to change it.
profile.toast_server_error: The server did not respond correctly. Please try again later.
profile.toast_network_error: Could not connect to the server.

management.title: Management
management.subtitle: Manage the internal operation of the platform, separate from catalog configuration.
management.users_desc: Here you will be able to manage users when we enable listing and management endpoints.
